case_title: SOLIMAN, MAHER VS SOTO, MOSES C/O SAFEWAY SUPERMARKET

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SOLIMAN, MAHER AS TO DEFENDANT SOTO, MOSES C/O SAFEWAY SUPERMARKET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. LETTER TO MOSES SOTO RETURNED UNCLAIMED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOLIMAN, MAHER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOTO, MOSES C/O SAFEWAY SUPERMARKET $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $35.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,035.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT SOTO, MOSES C/O SAFEWAY SUPERMARKET
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 22521, RECORD TRANSFERRED
NOT. OF JUDGM. TO MOSES SOTO RETURNED, MOVED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOLIMAN, MAHER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SOTO, MOSES C/O SAFEWAY SUPERMARKET JUDGMENT IS ORDERED FOR DEFENDANT AND AGAINST PLFT FOR $15.00 COSTS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
